author: @stevetobias4890
text: Another video I didn't get notified of. I have one of the old mugs, will buy one of these at some point this new year. Love the logo and Cats are my favourite football team here in Australia. 🤣

author: @rolliebca
text:
I'm not new to online shopping and searching - but . . . this cup is proving very difficult to find!
I have read through all the comments posted at this time and find I'm not the only one having trouble finding it.
Two points - I agree 100% with O Sailing, Get your YT channel name on there. Put a direct link to the cup in the description box. Can you put it in your website store?
Always look forward to your videos Rob. Been with you since the kitchen table days - fantastic journey!
Wishing you and the crew a fantastic 2021. Stay healthy!

author: @William_Hada
text: I definitely want one of these mugs but gave up this morning in frustration trying to find the place to buy one. Can someone please provide some information on this and perhaps a link?

author: @0sailing951
text: Rob, as I’ve said before, I find you and your videos brilliant, but I must say I’m a little disappointed with the cup. The design, and the message are 👌 but if you would just add the URL to your YouTube channel, or better still, a QR code with the embedded link to your YouTube channel, it would have turned a beautiful mug into a new marketing channel! See, now, I can buy one for myself because I know your channel, but if I bought one for some family Members, they may like the cup, but won’t get the full meaning unless they know where to find your YouTube channel! If it’s not too late, make yourself a QR code for your channel (plenty on free online tools to make them for you) and add it to the artwork for all your merchandise! It’s just the smart thing to do mate. All the best!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: that is an awesome idea mate - thank you for taking the time to share that - I will get onto it - just awesome - thanks again mate
